scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/api dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/api build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared --noEmit && tsc -p packages/db --noEmit && tsc -p apps/api --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web --noEmit
